tools.name: Superpowers
tools.use_for: domain specs, plans, and reusable project knowledge under docs/superpowers
tools.do_not_use_for: runtime automation or approval bypass
tools.next_step: keep as project knowledge source for BMAD and KT workspaces

tools.name: Agentic OS
tools.layer: agent runtime, governance, memory, tools, observability
tools.use_for: single control map across OpenClaw, Ollama, BMAD, approval gates, memory, lineage, and evals
tools.do_not_use_for: claiming production autonomy without gates
tools.next_step: use this catalog plus GOVERNANCE_INDEX as the adoption source

tools.name: NeMo Guardrails
tools.status: candidate; local guardrails endpoints already exist
tools.use_for: dialogue safety, jailbreak/prompt-injection flows, response policy checks
tools.do_not_use_for: replacing OPA, RBAC, HITL, or backend authorization
tools.next_step: pilot behind existing guardrails service and audit JSONL

tools.name: Letta + Mem0
tools.use_for: long-term agent memory, preferences, cross-session context
tools.do_not_use_for: secret storage, unbounded PII memory, production decisions without retention policy
tools.next_step: define memory retention, tenant isolation, erase/export, and audit before install

tools.name: Semantic Kernel
tools.use_for: skill/plugin orchestration experiments and enterprise workflow interop
tools.do_not_use_for: replacing the current OpenClaw/Redis default without parity tests
tools.next_step: compare against current OpenClaw/Pydantic AI council path on one workflow

tools.name: Pydantic AI
tools.use_for: schema-constrained author/reviewer/chair results and typed tool outputs
tools.do_not_use_for: default async OpenClaw worker path until enabled and tested
tools.next_step: enable only with INSUR_TYPED_COUNCIL_ENABLED=true and focused tests

tools.name: GraphRAG + Neo4j
tools.status: target; frontend/scaffold references exist, backend graph store not wired
tools.use_for: relationship-aware retrieval, dependency maps, entity resolution, explainability
tools.do_not_use_for: raw operational writes or bypassing repositories/services
tools.next_step: define graph schema, ingestion jobs, query API, tenancy, and eval set

tools.name: HITL
tools.use_for: high-risk decisions, destructive operations, external writes, production changes
tools.do_not_use_for: low-risk repo-local work that autonomy policy allows
tools.next_step: connect HITL events to OpenLineage/evaluator evidence where relevant

tools.name: Reflection Agents
tools.use_for: self-review, critique, repair loops, adversarial checks, bmad-code-review
tools.do_not_use_for: unbounded recursive loops or bypassing tests
tools.next_step: implement as bounded OpenClaw council/reflection tasks with max iterations

tools.name: Future
tools.use_for: items requiring operator decision, credentials, or production architecture
tools.do_not_use_for: present-tense production claims
tools.next_step: promote only after adoption questions and validation are complete

tools.name: OpenLineage
tools.use_for: pipeline/job dataset lineage, ML/data governance, eval provenance
tools.do_not_use_for: LLM prompt tracing alone; keep OTel/Langfuse/Phoenix for LLM traces
tools.next_step: pilot one pipeline event producer and store lineage evidence

tools.name: OWL + RDF
tools.use_for: formal vocabulary, ontology, triples, constraints, reasoning, interoperability
tools.do_not_use_for: ad hoc JSON replacement before ontology ownership exists
tools.next_step: create domain ontology, SHACL constraints, and CI validation before graph ingestion

tools.name: Microsoft Purview
tools.use_for: enterprise catalog, classifications, data estate governance, compliance workflows
tools.do_not_use_for: local-only default or any flow without Azure tenant/credential review
tools.next_step: require Azure subscription, data boundary, auth, and retention review

tools.name: Evaluators
tools.status: partially present via testing/eval docs and optional agent tooling
tools.use_for: LLM output quality, RAG faithfulness, policy compliance, regression gates
tools.do_not_use_for: blocking every local edit with expensive evals by default
tools.next_step: define fast default evaluators and opt-in heavy eval suite

tools.name: Spec Kit
tools.status: repo-local Spec Kit command wired to KT/BMAD; external Spec Kit not installed
tools.use_for: turn short requests into structured specs, tasks, acceptance criteria, and BMAD handoffs
tools.do_not_use_for: runtime execution or approval bypass
tools.next_step: use scripts/spec_kit.py for intake, then BMAD/OpenClaw routing

tools.name: BMAD
tools.use_for: PRD, architecture handoff, implementation stories, review checklists
tools.do_not_use_for: runtime orchestration, direct deploys, or production authority
tools.next_step: use after Spec Kit/KT capture and before agent execution

tools.name: Paperclip
tools.use_for: store redacted text artifacts, retrieve clips, and build context packs for agents
tools.do_not_use_for: secret storage, long-term unbounded PII retention, or bypassing repository/service boundaries
tools.next_step: add retention/TTL policy and object-storage backing if it becomes production-critical

tools.name: Harness Agent
tools.status: working local supervisor/fleet surfaces; external Harness platform not wired
tools.layer: agent runtime monitoring and task supervision
tools.use_for: local agent fleet status, queue inspection, task traces, and run supervision
tools.do_not_use_for: claiming Harness SaaS/CD production deployment integration
tools.next_step: keep local harness as the default proof surface; add external Harness only after CI/CD security review

tools.name: OpenClaw
tools.status: working local OpenClaw-compatible bridge; external OpenClaw gateway not bundled
tools.layer: task routing and council/simple queue bridge
tools.use_for: submit governed local tasks into Redis-backed simple or council queues
tools.do_not_use_for: external SaaS writes, production actions, or replacing service-layer APIs
tools.next_step: harden result TTL/indexing, circuit breaker, and external gateway adapter only if an official runtime is selected

tools.name: Hierarchical Orchestration
tools.use_for: manager-agent delegation, bounded worker fanout, reviewer escalation
tools.do_not_use_for: unbounded recursive delegation or unclear task ownership
tools.next_step: map hierarchy roles to OpenClaw queues and supervisor reports

tools.name: Mesh / Peer-to-Peer Agents
tools.use_for: peer review, debate, distributed specialist checks, redundancy
tools.do_not_use_for: production actions without a chair/arbiter and audit trail
tools.next_step: run parity eval against council-of-agents before implementation

tools.name: Hub and Spoke Architecture
tools.status: documented and used by local fleet docs
tools.use_for: 100-agent fleet supervision, task routing, and centralized governance
tools.do_not_use_for: single point of failure without queue health and fallback
tools.next_step: keep supervisor/queue metrics as the hub health signal

tools.name: Council of Agents Architecture
tools.status: working local council queue plus typed-council pilot
tools.use_for: author/reviewer/chair review, high-risk analysis, policy checks
tools.do_not_use_for: automatic final authority on regulated decisions
tools.next_step: compare Redis council and Pydantic AI typed council on one eval set

tools.name: Spec-driven Development
tools.status: repo-local Spec Kit + BMAD flow wired
tools.layer: requirements, acceptance criteria, and implementation planning
tools.use_for: turn requests into specs, stories, tests, and governed handoffs
tools.do_not_use_for: runtime automation or approval bypass
tools.next_step: make Spec Kit the entry point for ambiguous multi-step requests

tools.name: AI Dark Factory Architecture
tools.use_for: coordinate BMAD, Archon, coding agents, tests, approvals, and monitoring
tools.do_not_use_for: claiming fully autonomous production delivery
tools.next_step: promote each target-only tool only after validation and governance gates

tools.name: GSD (Get Shit Done)
tools.status: documented as philosophy, not a tool
tools.use_for: small scoped tasks with clear proof and quick validation
tools.do_not_use_for: skipping tests, docs, architecture boundaries, or governance
tools.next_step: express GSD as checklists in Spec Kit/BMAD handoffs

tools.name: Ralph / Ralph Loop
tools.use_for: bounded autonomous coding experiments with stop criteria
tools.do_not_use_for: unbounded self-repair loops, production writes, or bypassing project doctor
tools.next_step: define max iterations, budget, rollback, and reviewer gates before any pilot

tools.name: OpenSpec
tools.status: not wired; tracked as Spec Kit-adjacent candidate
tools.use_for: portable specs if the team standardizes on OpenSpec
tools.do_not_use_for: duplicating the current Spec Kit/BMAD handoff without migration plan
tools.next_step: compare schema fields against scripts/spec_kit.py output

tools.name: AWS Kiro
tools.use_for: future evaluation if AWS Kiro is selected by operator
tools.do_not_use_for: current repo claims, production runtime, or external AWS writes without approval
tools.next_step: requires tool availability, auth, data boundary, and parity test

tools.name: GitHub Spec
tools.layer: issues, specs, pull requests, and CI gates
tools.use_for: future GitHub-native spec/issue/PR workflow alignment
tools.do_not_use_for: bypassing local governance, CODEOWNERS, or project doctor
tools.next_step: define issue template, spec template, PR checklist, and CI validation

tools.name: Circuit Breaker
tools.status: working in RAG lifecycle only; not shared platform-wide
tools.use_for: protect flaky LLM/API calls and prevent retry storms
tools.do_not_use_for: claiming all services have circuit breakers
tools.next_step: extract shared resilience utility and reuse in agentic, council, and API clients

tools.name: Istio
tools.status: target only; not wired in Docker Compose runtime
tools.layer: service mesh, traffic policy, mTLS, canary, circuit breaking
tools.use_for: Kubernetes production service mesh after cluster adoption
tools.do_not_use_for: current local Docker Compose runtime claims
tools.next_step: requires Kubernetes manifests, mesh policy, and Kiali/OTel integration

tools.name: Kiali
tools.use_for: visualize Istio service graph and traffic health
tools.do_not_use_for: current local runtime claims without Istio
tools.next_step: wire only after Istio and Prometheus are deployed

tools.name: Service Discovery
tools.status: Docker Compose service-name discovery only; no Consul/Eureka/Kubernetes service discovery
tools.use_for: local service names such as postgres, redis, backend, frontend
tools.do_not_use_for: claiming dynamic production discovery
tools.next_step: choose Kubernetes DNS or service registry when production deployment target is selected

tools.name: Computer-Using Agent (CUA)
tools.status: policy-gated dry-run gateway; real CUA disabled
tools.use_for: dry-run action envelopes, audit rows, idempotency, and approval policy tests
tools.do_not_use_for: real browser/desktop side effects without allowlist, sandbox, session audit, and approval
tools.next_step: add real adapter only after browser/CUA safety policy and target allowlist

tools.name: Stagehand
tools.use_for: future Browserbase/Stagehand browser automation behind policy gates
tools.do_not_use_for: current production or local side-effect claims
tools.next_step: requires BROWSERBASE_API_KEY, package install, session lifecycle, allowlist, and tests

tools.name: Playwright
tools.category: browser testing and possible browser adapter
tools.status: frontend E2E dependency present; backend agentic adapter is stub/dry-run
tools.layer: frontend tests and future local browser automation
tools.use_for: frontend E2E tests and deterministic local browser checks
tools.do_not_use_for: real authenticated browser actions without approval and audit
tools.next_step: add Python Playwright adapter only after target allowlist and browser install

tools.name: Archon
tools.use_for: repeatable issue, implementation, validation, and handoff workflows
tools.do_not_use_for: production runtime, CI bypass, or direct deploy authority
tools.next_step: keep workflows aligned with project doctor and approval policy

tools.name: OpenHands
tools.status: candidate dependency tracked; not wired into runtime
tools.use_for: sandboxed coding experiments after risk review
tools.do_not_use_for: backend production runtime, unrestricted shell, or autonomous merge/deploy
tools.next_step: requires sandbox policy, test harness, and blast-radius controls

tools.name: Augment Code Intent
tools.use_for: future code-intent capture/evaluation if selected
tools.do_not_use_for: current architecture claims or runtime automation
tools.next_step: define evaluation criteria and compare against existing Codex/BMAD/Spec Kit flow

tools.name: Bernstein
tools.use_for: future isolated-worktree multi-agent coding orchestration experiments
tools.do_not_use_for: current production runtime or direct repository mutation without review
tools.next_step: requires install decision, isolated worktree policy, audit retention, and parity test

tools.name: LangGraph
tools.use_for: bounded graph workflows, reflection loops, deterministic agent state transitions
tools.do_not_use_for: replacing OpenClaw/Redis without parity and observability checks
tools.next_step: pilot one bounded reflection or review graph

tools.name: OpenAI Agents SDK
tools.use_for: tool-calling agents, handoffs, tracing-compatible experiments
tools.do_not_use_for: default production execution before auth, audit, and provider policy are defined
tools.next_step: pilot behind OpenClaw adapter with local governance and no secret exposure

tools.name: AutoGen
tools.use_for: research-grade multi-agent conversation and debate experiments
tools.do_not_use_for: replacing current council path without tests
tools.next_step: compare with CrewAI and local council on one task

tools.name: CrewAI
tools.use_for: role/goal/task orchestration experiments
tools.do_not_use_for: duplicating local council workers without measurable gain
tools.next_step: run parity eval against local council pattern

tools.name: LangSmith + Phoenix
tools.status: Phoenix preferred local/self-host path; LangSmith SaaS is opt-in only
tools.use_for: trace inspection, RAG/eval debugging, prompt/version evidence
tools.do_not_use_for: sending sensitive traces to SaaS without explicit key and retention review
tools.next_step: default to Phoenix locally; use LangSmith only with explicit environment opt-in

tools.name: AgentOps
tools.status: stage-1 candidate; SaaS key required for dashboard
tools.use_for: per-agent/session traces, costs, tool usage, and run health
tools.do_not_use_for: unreviewed external telemetry export
tools.next_step: wire only behind AGENTOPS_API_KEY and telemetry policy

tools.name: AI Command Center
tools.status: target operating layer; not a single installed product
tools.use_for: agent status, queue health, approvals, evals, incidents, lineage, and governance dashboards
tools.do_not_use_for: direct unrestricted action execution
tools.next_step: compose from agent supervisor, approval dashboard, guardrails, lineage, and eval views

tools.name: Enterprise Decision OS
tools.use_for: policy-backed decisions, HITL escalation, auditability, lineage, and explainability
tools.do_not_use_for: autonomous final authority on regulated or high-risk decisions
tools.next_step: requires decision schema, approval model, audit retention, and compliance signoff

tools.name: Autonomous Enterprise OS
tools.use_for: long-term autonomous workflows after governance, evals, memory, lineage, and HITL are mature
tools.do_not_use_for: current repo-local coding or production claims
tools.next_step: promote only after Enterprise Decision OS gates and production controls are proven

maturity_ladder.name: Spec Kit
maturity_ladder.purpose: Capture structured spec, acceptance criteria, constraints, and handoff inputs.
maturity_ladder.current_repo_status: Repo-local scripts/spec_kit.py creates specs and can route into KT/BMAD.

maturity_ladder.name: BMAD
maturity_ladder.purpose: Convert spec into PRD, architecture, stories, and review plan.

maturity_ladder.name: LangGraph
maturity_ladder.purpose: Stateful graph workflow for bounded agent flows and reflection loops.

maturity_ladder.name: OpenAI Agents SDK
maturity_ladder.purpose: Agent/tool/handoff SDK adapter for governed experiments.

maturity_ladder.name: CrewAI
maturity_ladder.purpose: Role-based agent teams and task orchestration.

maturity_ladder.name: Agentic OS
maturity_ladder.purpose: Unify runtime, governance, tools, memory, observability, approvals, and evals.

maturity_ladder.name: Letta + Mem0
maturity_ladder.current_repo_status: Candidate; retention and tenant policy required.

maturity_ladder.name: GraphRAG + Neo4j
maturity_ladder.purpose: Relationship-aware retrieval, lineage, dependency maps, and explainability.
maturity_ladder.current_repo_status: Design target; backend graph store not wired.

maturity_ladder.name: LangSmith + Phoenix
maturity_ladder.purpose: LLM trace, RAG debug, prompt/eval observability.
maturity_ladder.current_repo_status: Phoenix preferred local path; LangSmith opt-in SaaS.

maturity_ladder.name: NeMo Guardrails
maturity_ladder.purpose: Dialogue and policy guardrails layered behind existing authorization.
maturity_ladder.current_repo_status: Candidate; local guardrails endpoints already exist.

maturity_ladder.name: AgentOps
maturity_ladder.purpose: Agent run/session telemetry, cost, and tool-use observability.

maturity_ladder.name: AI Command Center
maturity_ladder.purpose: Operational console for queues, agents, approvals, evals, incidents, and lineage.

maturity_ladder.name: Enterprise Decision OS
maturity_ladder.purpose: Policy-backed decision accountability, HITL, lineage, and compliance.

maturity_ladder.name: Autonomous Enterprise OS
maturity_ladder.purpose: Mature cross-enterprise autonomy after governance and evaluation gates are proven.
